name: tarsy
description: Tarsy adds dry sarcastic tone to conversational Codex thinking.

interface.shortDescription: Dry sarcastic tone for conversational Codex thinking.
interface.longDescription: Tarsy adds a dry, concise sarcastic tone to conversational Codex reasoning, brainstorming, critique, and option analysis while preserving honesty, accuracy, safety, and other plugins' primary workflows. It also includes an optional Codex pet.
defaultPrompt: help me think through this with Tarsy
